title: Enable GitHub Pages from release workflow
description: Updated the Pages workflow so a newly created public repository can enable GitHub Pages for GitHub Actions deployments on first run, with documentation fallback if organization policy blocks automatic enablement.
decision_notes: The sanitized public repository was created successfully, but the second workflow failed at actions/configure-pages because the Pages site did not exist yet.
Using configure-pages enablement keeps the first public release path reproducible while preserving a manual Settings fallback in DELIVERY.md.
verification: gh run view 28325536006 --repo ai-org-labs/archmap --log-failed: Pages site Not Found during configure-pages
